hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$f" | grep -q 'database/schema.sql'; then echo 'BLOCKED: database/schema.sql is READ ONLY. Use a new Flyway migration file in db/migration/ instead.' >&2; exit 1; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$f" | grep -q '\.env'; then echo 'WARNING: You are editing an environment file. Ensure no real secrets are committed. Proceed only if this is .env.example.' >&2; fi
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$f" | grep -q 'frontend/src/'; then cd /home/ssthakur/app/training/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$f" | grep -q 'hrapp-service/src/main/java' && echo "$f" | grep -q '\.java$'; then classname=$(basename "$f" .java); if ! echo "$classname" | grep -q '^Hr'; then echo "NAMING VIOLATION: '$classname' must start with 'Hr' per project conventions." >&2; exit 1; fi; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$f" | grep -q 'db/migration/' && echo "$f" | grep -q '\.sql$'; then filename=$(basename "$f"); if ! echo "$filename" | grep -qP '^V[0-9]+__[a-z0-9_]+\.sql$'; then echo "MIGRATION NAMING VIOLATION: '$filename' must follow pattern V{n}__description.sql (lowercase, underscores only)." >&2; exit 1; fi; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$f" | grep -q 'hrapp-service/src/main/java' && echo "$f" | grep -q 'Service\.java$'; then matches=$(jq -r '.tool_input.new_string // .tool_input.content // empty' | grep -iE 'LOGGER\.(info|debug|warn|error).*\b(email|phone|salary|password|ssn)\b' || true); if [ -n "$matches" ]; then echo "PII LEAK DETECTED in logger statement. Use MASKED placeholder instead of logging sensitive fields." >&2; echo "$matches" >&2; exit 1; fi; fi
